member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentData
member.summary: Add document response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentData.DocumentId
member.summary: The created document identifier.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentData.Message
member.summary: Success message.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest
member.summary: Request body for adding a document to an index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.Id
member.summary: Document identifier (optional, will be auto-generated if not provided). Must be a valid GUID format if specified.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.Content
member.summary: Document content to be indexed.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.Labels
member.summary: Labels for categorizing the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.Tags
member.summary: Custom tags (key-value pairs) for the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Custom metadata object for the document. Can be any JSON-serializable object.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate an empty AddDocumentRequest.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate an AddDocumentRequest with content.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.AddDocumentRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Instantiate an AddDocumentRequest with content and optional parameters.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo
member.summary: Tenant information.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo.Identifier
member.summary: Unique identifier for the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo.Name
member.summary: Display name for the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo.Active
member.summary: Whether the tenant is active.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo.CreatedUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the tenant was created.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo.Labels
member.summary: Labels associated with the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantInfo.Tags
member.summary: Tags (key-value pairs) associated with the tenant.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.TenantsListData
member.summary: Tenants list response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantsListData.Tenants
member.summary: List of tenants.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.TenantsListData.Count
member.summary: Total count of tenants.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo
member.summary: User information.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.Identifier
member.summary: Unique identifier for the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant identifier the user belongs to.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.Email
member.summary: Email address of the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.FirstName
member.summary: First name of the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.LastName
member.summary: Last name of the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.IsAdmin
member.summary: Whether the user has administrator privileges.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.Active
member.summary: Whether the user is active.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.CreatedUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the user was created.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.Labels
member.summary: Labels associated with the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UserInfo.Tags
member.summary: Tags (key-value pairs) associated with the user.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.UsersListData
member.summary: Users list response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UsersListData.Users
member.summary: List of users.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.UsersListData.Count
member.summary: Total count of users.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo
member.summary: Credential information.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.Identifier
member.summary: Unique identifier for the credential.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant identifier the credential belongs to.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.Name
member.summary: Display name for the credential.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.BearerToken
member.summary: Bearer token for authentication.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.Active
member.summary: Whether the credential is active.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.CreatedUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the credential was created.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.Labels
member.summary: Labels associated with the credential.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialInfo.Tags
member.summary: Tags (key-value pairs) associated with the credential.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialsListData
member.summary: Credentials list response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialsListData.Credentials
member.summary: List of credentials.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CredentialsListData.Count
member.summary: Total count of credentials.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantRequest
member.summary: Create tenant request.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantRequest.Name
member.summary: Display name for the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantRequest.Description
member.summary: Description of the tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest
member.summary: Create user request.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest.Email
member.summary: Email address of the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest.Password
member.summary: Password for the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest.FirstName
member.summary: First name of the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest.LastName
member.summary: Last name of the user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest.IsAdmin
member.summary: Whether the user has administrator privileges.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Whether the user has administrator privileges.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateCredentialRequest
member.summary: Create credential request.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateCredentialRequest.Description
member.summary: Description of the credential.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CreateCredentialRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantData
member.summary: Create tenant response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantData.Message
member.summary: Response message.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateTenantData.Tenant
member.summary: Created tenant information.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserData
member.summary: Create user response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserData.Message
member.summary: Response message.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateUserData.User
member.summary: Created user information.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateCredentialData
member.summary: Create credential response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateCredentialData.Message
member.summary: Response message.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateCredentialData.Credential
member.summary: Created credential information.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteData
member.summary: Delete response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteData.Message
member.summary: Response message.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse
member.summary: Standard API response wrapper for all Verbex API calls.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.Guid
member.summary: Unique request tracking identifier.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the request was successful.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.TimestampUtc
member.summary: ISO 8601 timestamp of the response.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code of the response.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the request failed.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.Data
member.summary: Response payload data. Structure varies by endpoint.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.TotalCount
member.summary: Total count for paginated results.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse.ProcessingTimeMs
member.summary: Request processing time in milliseconds.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Typed API response with strongly-typed data.
member.typeparam: The type of the data payload.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.Guid
member.summary: Unique request tracking identifier.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the request was successful.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.TimestampUtc
member.summary: ISO 8601 timestamp of the response.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code of the response.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the request failed.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: Response payload data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total count for paginated results.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse`1.ProcessingTimeMs
member.summary: Request processing time in milliseconds.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum
member.summary: Specifies the result of an authentication attempt.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.Success
member.summary: Authentication was successful.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.NotAuthenticated
member.summary: No authentication was attempted (no credentials provided).

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.MissingCredentials
member.summary: Required credentials were missing from the request.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.NotFound
member.summary: The specified user, tenant, or administrator was not found.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.Inactive
member.summary: The account exists but is inactive (disabled).

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.InvalidCredentials
member.summary: The provided credentials (password or bearer token) were invalid.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.TenantNotFound
member.summary: The specified tenant was not found.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.TenantInactive
member.summary: The tenant exists but is inactive (disabled).

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum.TenantAccessDenied
member.summary: The user does not have permission to access the requested tenant.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum
member.summary: Specifies the result of an authorization check.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum.Authorized
member.summary: Authorization was successful; the user has access to the requested resource.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum.Unauthorized
member.summary: Authorization failed; the user is not authorized.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum.InsufficientPrivileges
member.summary: The user is authenticated but lacks sufficient privileges for this operation.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum.ResourceNotFound
member.summary: The requested resource was not found.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum.AccessDenied
member.summary: Access to the requested resource is denied.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration settings for index caching.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: Whether caching is enabled. Default: false

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.EnableTermCache
member.summary: Whether term caching is enabled. Default: true (when caching is enabled)

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of terms to cache. Default: 10000

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheEvictCount
member.summary: Number of terms to evict when cache is full. Default: 100

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: Time-to-live in seconds for term cache entries. Default: 300 (5 minutes)

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheSlidingExpiration
member.summary: Whether term cache uses sliding expiration. Default: true

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.EnableDocumentCache
member.summary: Whether document caching is enabled. Default: true (when caching is enabled)

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of documents to cache. Default: 5000

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheEvictCount
member.summary: Number of documents to evict when cache is full. Default: 50

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: Time-to-live in seconds for document cache entries. Default: 600 (10 minutes)

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheSlidingExpiration
member.summary: Whether document cache uses sliding expiration. Default: true

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.EnableStatisticsCache
member.summary: Whether statistics caching is enabled. Default: true (when caching is enabled)

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.StatisticsCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: Time-to-live in seconds for statistics cache. Default: 60 (1 minute)

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate a CacheConfiguration with default values (caching disabled).

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Instantiate a CacheConfiguration with caching enabled.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CacheConfiguration.CreateEnabled
member.summary: Creates a CacheConfiguration with default settings and caching enabled.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats
member.summary: Statistics for a single cache instance.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this cache is enabled.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.HitCount
member.summary: Number of cache hits.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.MissCount
member.summary: Number of cache misses.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.HitRate
member.summary: Cache hit rate (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.CurrentCount
member.summary: Current number of items in the cache.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.Capacity
member.summary: Maximum capacity of the cache.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.EvictionCount
member.summary: Number of items evicted from the cache.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CacheStats.ExpiredCount
member.summary: Number of items expired from the cache.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexData
member.summary: Create index response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexData.Message
member.summary: Success message.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexData.Index
member.summary: The created index information.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest
member.summary: Request body for creating a new index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant ID for the index. Required for global admin users, ignored for tenant users.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.Name
member.summary: Display name for the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.Description
member.summary: Description of the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.InMemory
member.summary: Whether this index should be in-memory only. When true, index data is not persisted and will be lost on restart.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.EnableLemmatizer
member.summary: Whether to enable word lemmatization.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.EnableStopWordRemover
member.summary: Whether to enable stop word removal.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.MinTokenLength
member.summary: Minimum token length (0 = disabled).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.MaxTokenLength
member.summary: Maximum token length (0 = disabled).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.Labels
member.summary: Labels for categorizing the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.Tags
member.summary: Custom tags (key-value pairs) for the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Custom metadata object for the index. Can be any JSON-serializable object.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.CacheConfiguration
member.summary: Cache configuration for the index. When null, caching is disabled.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate an empty CreateIndexRequest.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate a CreateIndexRequest with required parameters.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.CreateIndexRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate a CreateIndexRequest with name and description.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteDocumentData
member.summary: Delete document response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteDocumentData.DocumentId
member.summary: The deleted document identifier.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteDocumentData.Message
member.summary: Success message.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteIndexData
member.summary: Delete index response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteIndexData.Message
member.summary: Success message.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DeleteIndexData.IndexId
member.summary: The deleted index identifier.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo
member.summary: Document information model. Matches the server's DocumentMetadata serialization format.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.DocumentId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.Id
member.summary: Document ID as string (alias for compatibility).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.DocumentPath
member.summary: Document path.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.OriginalFileName
member.summary: Original file name.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.DocumentLength
member.summary: Document length in characters.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.IndexedDate
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the document was indexed.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.LastModified
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the document was last modified.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.ContentSha256
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of the document content.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.Terms
member.summary: Terms in the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.IsDeleted
member.summary: Whether the document is deleted.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Custom metadata object associated with the document. Can be any JSON-serializable object.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.Labels
member.summary: Labels associated with the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.Tags
member.summary: Tags (key-value pairs) associated with the document. Alias for CustomMetadata for API consistency.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentInfo.IndexingRuntimeMs
member.summary: Indexing runtime in milliseconds. Time taken to process and index the document content. Null if not yet indexed or timing was not captured.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentsListData
member.summary: List documents response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentsListData.Documents
member.summary: List of documents in the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DocumentsListData.Count
member.summary: Total count of documents.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem
member.summary: Represents a document to be added in a batch operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.Id
member.summary: Optional document ID (auto-generated if not provided).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.Name
member.summary: Document name/path.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.Content
member.summary: Document content to index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.Labels
member.summary: Optional labels for the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.Tags
member.summary: Optional tags (key-value pairs) for the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Optional custom metadata (any JSON-serializable value).

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new batch add document item.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new batch add document item with name and content.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new batch add document item with ID, name, and content.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentsRequest
member.summary: Request body for batch add documents operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentsRequest.Documents
member.summary: List of documents to add.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentsRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new batch add documents request.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentsRequest.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem})
member.summary: Creates a new batch add documents request with the specified documents.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchCheckExistenceRequest
member.summary: Request body for batch document existence check operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchCheckExistenceRequest.Ids
member.summary: List of document IDs to check for existence.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchCheckExistenceRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new batch check existence request.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchCheckExistenceRequest.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a new batch check existence request with the specified IDs.
member.param: List of document IDs to check.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentResult
member.summary: Result item for a single document in a batch add operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentResult.DocumentId
member.summary: Document ID (populated for successful adds).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentResult.Name
member.summary: Document name.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentResult.Success
member.summary: Whether the document was added successfully.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the add failed.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentsResponse
member.summary: Result of a batch add documents operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentsResponse.Added
member.summary: List of successfully added documents.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentsResponse.Failed
member.summary: List of documents that failed to be added.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentsResponse.AddedCount
member.summary: Number of documents successfully added.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentsResponse.FailedCount
member.summary: Number of documents that failed to be added.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchAddDocumentsResponse.RequestedCount
member.summary: Total number of documents in the request.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchCheckExistenceResponse
member.summary: Result of a batch existence check operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchCheckExistenceResponse.Exists
member.summary: List of document IDs that exist.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchCheckExistenceResponse.NotFound
member.summary: List of document IDs that do not exist.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchCheckExistenceResponse.ExistsCount
member.summary: Number of documents that exist.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchCheckExistenceResponse.NotFoundCount
member.summary: Number of documents that do not exist.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchCheckExistenceResponse.RequestedCount
member.summary: Total number of IDs in the request.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchDeleteResponse
member.summary: Result of a batch document deletion operation. Contains lists of successfully deleted and not found document IDs.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchDeleteResponse.Deleted
member.summary: List of document IDs that were successfully deleted.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchDeleteResponse.NotFound
member.summary: List of document IDs that were not found in the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchDeleteResponse.DeletedCount
member.summary: Number of documents that were successfully deleted.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchDeleteResponse.NotFoundCount
member.summary: Number of document IDs that were not found.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchDeleteResponse.RequestedCount
member.summary: Total number of document IDs that were requested for deletion.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchRetrieveResponse
member.summary: Result of a batch document retrieval operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchRetrieveResponse.Documents
member.summary: List of documents that were found.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchRetrieveResponse.NotFound
member.summary: List of document IDs that were not found.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchRetrieveResponse.Count
member.summary: Number of documents returned.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.BatchRetrieveResponse.RequestedCount
member.summary: Total number of document IDs that were requested.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.RestoreResult
member.summary: Result of a restore operation.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.RestoreResult.Success
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the restore was successful.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.RestoreResult.IndexId
member.summary: Gets or sets the restored index identifier.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.RestoreResult.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the result message.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Responses.RestoreResult.Warnings
member.summary: Gets or sets any warnings from the restore operation.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions
member.summary: Options for paginated enumeration requests.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.MaxResults
member.summary: Maximum number of results to return per page. Must be between 1 and 1000, inclusive. Default is 100.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.Skip
member.summary: Number of records to skip before returning results. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.ContinuationToken
member.summary: Opaque continuation token for pagination. Use the token from a previous result to fetch the next page.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.Ordering
member.summary: Ordering for the results. Default is CreatedDescending (newest first).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.Labels
member.summary: Optional list of labels to filter by. Documents must have ALL specified labels to be included (AND logic). Label matching is case-insensitive. If null or empty, no label filtering is applied.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.Tags
member.summary: Optional dictionary of tags (key-value pairs) to filter by. Documents must have ALL specified tags with matching values to be included (AND logic). Tag matching is exact (case-sensitive for both key and value). If null or empty, no tag filtering is applied.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate with default values.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOrderEnum)
member.summary: Instantiate with specified parameters.
member.param: Maximum number of results per page.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions.ToQueryString
member.summary: Builds the query string portion for the URL.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOrderEnum
member.summary: Specifies the ordering for enumeration results.

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOrderEnum.CreatedAscending
member.summary: Order by creation timestamp ascending (oldest first).

member.name: F:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOrderEnum.CreatedDescending
member.summary: Order by creation timestamp descending (newest first).

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1
member.summary: Result container for paginated enumeration of collections.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the request was successful.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of when the result was generated.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.MaxResults
member.summary: Maximum number of results requested.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.Skip
member.summary: Number of records skipped.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.IterationsRequired
member.summary: Number of iterations required to produce this result.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.ContinuationToken
member.summary: Opaque continuation token for fetching the next page. Null when EndOfResults is true.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.EndOfResults
member.summary: Indicates whether there are no more records to fetch.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.TotalRecords
member.summary: Total number of records in the collection before pagination.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.RecordsRemaining
member.summary: Number of records remaining after this page.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.Objects
member.summary: The paginated items for this result page.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.HasMore
member.summary: Returns true if there are more records available to fetch.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationResult`1.GetNextPageOptions
member.summary: Creates EnumerationOptions to fetch the next page.
member.returns: Options for fetching the next page, or null if at end of results.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.HealthData
member.summary: Health check response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.HealthData.Status
member.summary: Server health status (e.g., "Healthy").

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.HealthData.Version
member.summary: Server version.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.HealthData.Timestamp
member.summary: Server timestamp.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo
member.summary: Index information model. Matches the server's index metadata serialization format.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Identifier
member.summary: Unique identifier for the index (auto-generated).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant identifier the index belongs to.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Name
member.summary: Display name for the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Description
member.summary: Description of the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the index is enabled.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.InMemory
member.summary: Whether the index uses in-memory storage only.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.CreatedUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the index was created.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Statistics
member.summary: Index statistics (document count, term count, etc.).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Labels
member.summary: Labels associated with the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.Tags
member.summary: Tags (key-value pairs) associated with the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexInfo.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Custom metadata object associated with the index. Can be any JSON-serializable object.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics
member.summary: Index statistics model.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.DocumentCount
member.summary: Number of documents in the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.TermCount
member.summary: Number of unique terms in the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.PostingCount
member.summary: Total number of postings (term-document pairs) in the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.AverageDocumentLength
member.summary: Average document length in terms.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.TotalDocumentSize
member.summary: Total size of all documents in characters.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.TotalTermOccurrences
member.summary: Total number of term occurrences across all documents.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.AverageTermsPerDocument
member.summary: Average terms per document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.AverageDocumentFrequency
member.summary: Average document frequency across all terms.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.MaxDocumentFrequency
member.summary: Maximum document frequency (most common term).

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.MinDocumentLength
member.summary: Minimum document length.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.MaxDocumentLength
member.summary: Maximum document length.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.CacheStatistics
member.summary: Cache statistics for this index. Null if caching is disabled.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.GeneratedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when these statistics were generated.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndexStatistics.MemoryUsageMb
member.summary: Memory usage in megabytes.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.IndicesListData
member.summary: List indices response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndicesListData.Indices
member.summary: List of available indices.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.IndicesListData.Count
member.summary: Total count of indices.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.LoginData
member.summary: Login response data containing authentication token.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginData.Token
member.summary: Bearer token for authenticated requests.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginData.Username
member.summary: Authenticated username or email.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginData.Email
member.summary: The email address of the authenticated user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginData.IsAdmin
member.summary: Indicates whether the user is a tenant administrator.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginData.IsGlobalAdmin
member.summary: Indicates whether the user is a global administrator.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest
member.summary: Request body for user authentication.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest.Username
member.summary: Username for authentication.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest.Password
member.summary: Password for authentication.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant ID for tenant-scoped authentication.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate an empty LoginRequest.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate a LoginRequest with credentials.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.LoginRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate a LoginRequest with credentials and tenant ID.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult
member.summary: Result of a login attempt, containing authentication and authorization status along with session context.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the login was successful.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.AuthenticationResult
member.summary: The result of the authentication attempt.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.AuthorizationResult
member.summary: The result of the authorization check.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the login failed.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.Token
member.summary: Bearer token for authenticated requests. Only populated on successful login.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.TenantId
member.summary: The tenant identifier for the authenticated session.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.UserId
member.summary: The user identifier for the authenticated session.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.Email
member.summary: The email address of the authenticated user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.IsAdmin
member.summary: Indicates whether the authenticated user is a tenant administrator.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.IsGlobalAdmin
member.summary: Indicates whether the authenticated user is a global administrator.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate an empty LoginResult.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.Successful(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a successful login result.
member.param: Whether the user is a tenant admin.
Whether the user is a global admin.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.LoginResult.Failed(Verbex.Sdk.AuthenticationResultEnum,Verbex.Sdk.AuthorizationResultEnum,System.String)
member.summary: Create a failed login result.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.SearchData
member.summary: Search response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchData.Query
member.summary: The search query that was executed.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchData.Results
member.summary: List of search results.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchData.TotalCount
member.summary: Total count of matching documents.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchData.MaxResults
member.summary: Maximum results requested.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchData.SearchTime
member.summary: Time taken for the search in milliseconds.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest
member.summary: Request body for searching documents in an index with optional label and tag filters.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest.Query
member.summary: Search query string. Use "*" as a wildcard to return all documents (optionally filtered by labels/tags) without term matching. Wildcard results have a score of 0.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest.MaxResults
member.summary: Maximum number of results to return. Default value is 100.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest.Labels
member.summary: Optional list of labels to filter by. Documents must have ALL specified labels to match (AND logic). Label matching is case-insensitive. If null or empty, no label filtering is applied.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest.Tags
member.summary: Optional dictionary of tags (key-value pairs) to filter by. Documents must have ALL specified tags with matching values to match (AND logic). Tag matching is exact (case-sensitive for both key and value). If null or empty, no tag filtering is applied.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate an empty SearchRequest.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.SearchRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Instantiate a SearchRequest with query parameters.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 100.
Optional labels to filter by (AND logic, case-insensitive).
Optional tags to filter by (AND logic, exact match).

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.SearchResult
member.summary: Individual search result model.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchResult.DocumentId
member.summary: The document identifier.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchResult.Score
member.summary: Relevance score for the result.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.SearchResult.Content
member.summary: Document content or excerpt.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData
member.summary: Token validation response data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData.Valid
member.summary: Indicates whether the token is valid.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData.TenantId
member.summary: The tenant identifier associated with the token.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData.UserId
member.summary: The user identifier associated with the token.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData.Email
member.summary: The email address associated with the token.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData.IsAdmin
member.summary: Indicates whether the user is a tenant administrator.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.ValidationData.IsGlobalAdmin
member.summary: Indicates whether the user is a global administrator.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexCacheStatistics
member.summary: Aggregate cache statistics for an index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexCacheStatistics.Enabled
member.summary: Whether caching is enabled for this index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexCacheStatistics.TermCache
member.summary: Term cache statistics. Null if term cache is disabled.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexCacheStatistics.DocumentCache
member.summary: Document metadata cache statistics. Null if document cache is disabled.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexCacheStatistics.StatisticsCache
member.summary: Statistics cache statistics. Null if statistics cache is disabled.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexCacheStatistics.CachedDocumentCount
member.summary: Cached document count value. Null if not cached.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient
member.summary: Verbex SDK Client for .NET. Provides methods to interact with all Verbex REST API endpoints.
member.remarks: This client is thread-safe and can be reused for multiple requests. Implements IDisposable to properly clean up HTTP resources. All methods return domain objects directly rather than wrapped responses.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new VerbexClient instance.
member.param: The base URL of the Verbex server (e.g., "http://localhost:8080").
member.exception: Thrown when endpoint or accessKey is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the HTTP client resources.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.RootHealthCheckAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks server health via the root endpoint.
member.returns: Health check data including status and version.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.HealthCheckAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks server health via the /v1.0/health endpoint.
member.returns: Health check data including status and version.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates with tenant ID, email, and password.
member.returns: Login result indicating success or failure with context.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.LoginAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates with an existing bearer token by validating it against the server.
member.param: The bearer token to validate and use.
member.returns: Login result indicating success or failure with context.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ValidateTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the current bearer token.
member.returns: Validation data including whether the token is valid and user details.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListIndicesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all available indices.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListIndicesAsync(Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists available indices with pagination support.
member.returns: Enumeration result containing indices and pagination information.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListAllIndicesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all indices by iterating through all pages.
Creates a new index.
member.param: Whether to use in-memory storage only.
Optional list of labels to associate with the index.
Optional key-value tags to associate with the index.
Tenant ID (required for global admin users, optional for tenant users).

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetIndexAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific index.
member.exception: Thrown when the index is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.IndexExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if an index exists.
member.returns: True if the index exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DeleteIndexAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an index.
member.exception: Thrown when the index is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateIndexLabelsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates labels on an index (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the index is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateIndexTagsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates tags on an index (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the index is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListDocumentsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all documents in an index.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListDocumentsAsync(System.String,Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists documents in an index with pagination support.
member.returns: Enumeration result containing documents and pagination information.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListAllDocumentsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all documents in an index by iterating through all pages.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.AddDocumentAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a document to an index.
member.param: Optional document ID (GUID format, auto-generated if not provided).
Optional list of labels to associate with the document.
Optional key-value tags to associate with the document.
member.returns: The created document data including the document ID.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetDocumentAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific document.
member.exception: Thrown when the document is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetDocumentsBatchAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets multiple documents by IDs from an index in a single request.
member.param: Collection of document IDs to retrieve.
member.returns: Batch result containing found documents and list of not found IDs.
member.exception: Thrown when indexId or documentIds is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DocumentExistsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a document exists in an index.
member.returns: True if the document exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DeleteDocumentAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a document from an index.
member.exception: Thrown when the document is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DeleteDocumentsBatchAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes multiple documents from an index by IDs in a single request.
member.param: Collection of document IDs to delete.
member.returns: Batch result containing lists of deleted and not found IDs.
member.exception: Thrown when indexId or documentIds is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.AddDocumentsBatchAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Verbex.Sdk.DTO.Requests.BatchAddDocumentItem},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds multiple documents to an index in a single request.
member.returns: Batch result containing lists of added and failed documents.
member.exception: Thrown when indexId or documents is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.CheckDocumentsExistAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if multiple documents exist in an index.
member.param: Collection of document IDs to check.
member.returns: Batch result containing lists of existing and not found IDs.
member.exception: Thrown when indexId or documentIds is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateDocumentLabelsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates labels on a document (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the document is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateDocumentTagsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates tags on a document (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the document is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.SearchAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches documents in an index.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return.
Optional labels to filter by (AND logic, case-insensitive).
Optional tags to filter by (AND logic, exact match).
member.returns: Search data including results and metadata.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetTopTermsAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the top terms in an index sorted by document frequency.
member.param: Maximum number of terms to return (default: 10).
member.returns: Dictionary mapping terms to their document frequencies.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.BackupAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a backup of an index and returns it as a stream. The stream contains a ZIP archive with the index database and metadata.
member.returns: A stream containing the backup ZIP archive.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.BackupAsBytesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a backup of an index and returns it as a byte array.
member.returns: A byte array containing the backup ZIP archive.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.BackupToFileAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a backup of an index and saves it to a file.
member.param: The file path to save the backup to.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.RestoreAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a backup to create a new index.
member.param: Optional new name for the restored index.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.RestoreFromFileAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a backup from a file to create a new index.
member.param: The path to the backup file.
Optional new name for the restored index.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.RestoreReplaceAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a backup by replacing an existing index.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListTenantsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all tenants.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListTenantsAsync(Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists tenants with pagination support.
member.returns: Enumeration result containing tenants and pagination information.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListAllTenantsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all tenants by iterating through all pages.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetTenantAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific tenant.
member.exception: Thrown when the tenant is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.CreateTenantAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DeleteTenantAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a tenant.
member.exception: Thrown when the tenant is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListUsersAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all users in a tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListUsersAsync(System.String,Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists users in a tenant with pagination support.
member.returns: Enumeration result containing users and pagination information.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListAllUsersAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all users in a tenant by iterating through all pages.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetUserAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific user.
member.exception: Thrown when the user is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.CreateUserAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new user in a tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DeleteUserAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a user.
member.exception: Thrown when the user is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListCredentialsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all credentials in a tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListCredentialsAsync(System.String,Verbex.Sdk.EnumerationOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists credentials in a tenant with pagination support.
member.returns: Enumeration result containing credentials and pagination information.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.ListAllCredentialsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all credentials in a tenant by iterating through all pages.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.GetCredentialAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific credential.
member.exception: Thrown when the credential is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.CreateCredentialAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new credential (API key) in a tenant.
member.returns: The created credential information (includes bearer token).

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.DeleteCredentialAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a credential.
member.exception: Thrown when the credential is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateTenantLabelsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates labels on a tenant (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the tenant is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateTenantTagsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates tags on a tenant (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the tenant is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateUserLabelsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates labels on a user (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the user is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateUserTagsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates tags on a user (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the user is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateCredentialLabelsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates labels on a credential (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the credential is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateCredentialTagsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates tags on a credential (full replacement).
member.exception: Thrown when the credential is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateIndexCustomMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates custom metadata on an index (full replacement).
member.param: The custom metadata object to set. Can be any JSON-serializable object.
member.exception: Thrown when the index is not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexClient.UpdateDocumentCustomMetadataAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates custom metadata on a document (full replacement).
member.param: The custom metadata object to set. Can be any JSON-serializable object.
member.exception: Thrown when the document is not found.

member.name: T:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException
member.summary: Exception thrown for Verbex API errors.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code from the API response.

member.name: P:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException.Response
member.summary: The API response associated with this error.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new VerbexException.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new VerbexException with status code.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,Verbex.Sdk.ApiResponse)
member.summary: Creates a new VerbexException with status code and response.

member.name: M:Verbex.Sdk.VerbexException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a new VerbexException with an inner exception.
